name: research-workflow
description: Domain-agnostic research-coding workflow discipline for computational science (JAX/Python research family). 67 skills across ideate / literature / scope / build-correctly / equation-critical sources / verify / inference-rigor / review / performance-and-scale / record / communicate / reproduce-and-release, plus an equation-verifier agent and six slash commands. v1.4.x adds a true front-of-funnel (research ideation + research brainstorming + prior-art check + reading-notes and related-work-map literature discipline), Bayesian/statistical inference rigor (MCMC convergence, predictive checks, model selection), HPC performance & scale (profiling, scaling, JAX performance, cluster-run contract), and software/data release & citation (CITATION.cff/DOI, release checklist, data management plans). The suite covers evidence-first execution, numerical validation, reproducibility, PDF equation extraction, equation-to-code traceability, reference-license firewalls, computational-physics code review, figure faithfulness, MyST documentation authoring, eight self-limiting enforcement hooks, and per-domain lenses for reference-parity work.
